zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick於1190年之前出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，他的父親Robert de Leybourne24歲，母親Mrs. Margaret De Leybourne20歲。他於1219年之前與Eleanor Turnham結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1215年登記服兵役。他去世於1251年之前在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leybourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Laybourne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Leyburn in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hlēg ‘shelter’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick was born before 1190, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Leybourne, was 24 and his mother, Mrs. Margaret De Leybourne, was 20. He married Eleanor Turnham before 1219. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1215. He died before 1251, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwickが1190年以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Robert de Leybourneは24歳，母Mrs. Margaret De Leybourneは20歳であった。1219年以前にEleanor Turnhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1215年に兵役登録をした。彼は1251年以前にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで死去した。

ko.Great and Little Berwick, Shropshire, En: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 그리트 앤드 리틀 버윅
ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick(이)가 1190년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Leybourne(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Margaret De Leybourne(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1219년 이전 Eleanor Turnham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1215년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1251년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Leybourne Lord of Berwick родился перед 1190 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Leybourne было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Margaret De Leybourne, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Turnham перед 1219 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1215 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер перед 1251 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.
